_doc: Single source of truth for every backend URL/path the edge-proxy worker (or its companion deploy infra)
hard-codes outside the FastAPI app. Task #887 — added so the Task #877 class of bug (a probe URL drifts
away from the real router prefix and silently 404s for ~56h before anyone notices) can be caught by a
deterministic CI check instead of a manual log review.
Task #900 extended the manifest to also cover the edge-cache config (CACHEABLE_PREFIXES / CACHE_TTL /
BYPASS_PREFIXES / USER_SPECIFIC_PREFIXES) — same drift class: a renamed FastAPI route silently stops
matching the cache rule and bypasses the cache forever, with no probe ever firing. Cache-related
entries carry an optional `edge_cache` block; `workers/edge-proxy/src/index.ts` derives its runtime
constants from this manifest via `monitored-urls.ts` so there is exactly one source of truth.
Task #901 added a second drift gate: each `registered_in` file must actually still mention the path,
either as a literal string or via a declared `runtime_constant` export name. This catches the case
where a registered file is refactored to no longer reference the path (or the path constant is renamed)
but the manifest entry rots silently.
Two arrays:
backend_paths       — paths that MUST resolve to a real FastAPI route (exact-match on the OpenAPI
schema, or prefix-match when 'match' is 'prefix'). Add a one-line 'rationale'
so a future reader knows why the worker hard-codes the path.
intentionally_external — full URLs the worker hits that are NOT FastAPI routes (e.g. the public
homepage served by Cloudflare Pages, an external webhook endpoint). Each entry
MUST carry a non-empty 'rationale' or the drift test fails.
Optional fields on backend_paths / intentionally_external entries:
edge_cache.behavior     — 'cacheable' (worker stores in CF cache) or 'bypass' (worker forbids caching).
edge_cache.ttl_seconds  — cache TTL when behavior='cacheable'. Required for cacheable entries.
edge_cache.user_keyed   — when true, the cache key includes a per-user identity header so each user
gets their own cached entry (e.g. /api/user/stats).
runtime_constant        — name of the exported identifier (constant or helper function) that the
registered_in file uses to reach this path/URL. When set, the Task #901
drift test accepts the file mentioning that identifier as a stand-in for
the literal path string (use this for paths the file consumes via an
import rather than inlining as a literal).
If you add a new probe / healthcheck / hard-coded backend URL anywhere, register it here. The drift
test (artifacts/syrabit-backend/tests/test_monitoring_url_drift.py) gates merges on this manifest.

backend_paths.rationale: synthetic-probe target — Task #708 1-minute external probe of the admin diagnostics paging path; drifted in Task #877 and stayed dark for ~56h
Railway restart-probe healthcheck (cheap process-alive check; Task #848)
Docker HEALTHCHECK CMD inside the container image
edge-cached public board list — same body for every visitor (Task #900)
edge-cached public class list — same body for every visitor (Task #900)
edge-cached public stream list — same body for every visitor (Task #900)
edge-cached public subject list — same body for every visitor (Task #900)
edge-cached public chapter data keyed by path segment (Task #900)
edge-cached public chunk data keyed by path segment (Task #900)
edge-cached public chapter lookup by slug (Task #900)
edge-cached heavy public library bundle; admin writes purge it explicitly. TTL bumped 300→1800s so cold POPs avoid the ~1.5s D1+backend round-trip every TTL boundary (Task #900)
edge-cached public topic detail keyed by path segment (Task #900)
edge-cached SEO keyword index — TTL override (longer than parent /api/seo/ default of 600s); listed BEFORE /api/seo/ so length-desc TTL lookup wins (Task #900)
edge-cached public SEO metadata; default TTL for the SEO router family (Task #900)
edge-cached public past-year question bank (Task #900)
edge-cached per-user stats — cache key includes the identity header so each user gets their own entry (Task #900)
edge-cached institution allowlist — changes rarely, 1d TTL (Task #900)
edge bypass — streaming AI responses are non-idempotent and per-session; must never be cached (Task #900)
edge bypass — inbound POST events from payment / push providers; must never be cached (Task #900)
edge bypass — auth tokens and session cookies must always be fresh (Task #900)

intentionally_external.rationale: cf-block-probe target — public homepage served by Cloudflare Pages, NOT the FastAPI backend (Task #817)
